case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC, VS. BETTY JONES ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-28-2016 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BETTY JONES' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
